title: Section 107
content: 1[107. Application of Act 36 of 1963.--- On and from the commencement of the Waqf (Amendment) Act, 2025, the Limitation Act, 1963 shall apply to any proceedings in relation to any claim or interest pertaining to immovable property comprised in a waqf.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 14 of 2025, s. 44, for section 107 (w.e.f. 08-04-2025).
